description: This file is an HTML webpage that provides a user interface for visualizing database schemas and data. It includes embedded CSS styles for layout and styling, and JavaScript code for fetching and displaying database information, tables, and data dynamically. The script interacts with backend API endpoints to retrieve database lists, table lists, and table data, supporting user interactions like selecting databases/tables and expanding cell contents.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of databases from the backend API and renders them in the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the database list by re-fetching data and resetting UI state.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses the database to show its tables, and loads table list when expanded.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays the list of tables within a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Loads and displays data from a selected table, with a limit of 50 records.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Constructs HTML to display tabular data, including headers and rows.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Renders individual table cell content, handling objects, long strings, and nulls.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content for detailed view of long strings or objects.
